requirement_topic.en: Radio and EMC — IMDA Equipment Registration for Power Banks with Wireless Functions
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电与EMC——含无线功能移动电源的IMDA设备注册
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電與EMC——含無線功能行動電源的IMDA設備註冊

summary.en: In Singapore there is no single CE-style mark; radio and EMC obligations for power banks are handled by the Infocomm Media Development Authority (IMDA). A power bank that incorporates wireless functionality — for example Qi wireless charging output, Bluetooth state-of-charge reporting, or NFC — is radio-communications equipment and must be registered under the IMDA Equipment Registration Framework before being supplied or sold in Singapore. IMDA operates General, Simplified, and Full registration tiers depending on the device type, and registered equipment must comply with the applicable IMDA technical specifications (e.g., TS SRD for short-range devices) and use approved frequency bands. A non-wireless power bank (plain USB output, protection IC, display only) is governed primarily by the product-safety SAFETY Mark route rather than IMDA radio registration, though general EMC good-engineering expectations still apply. The IMDA Compliance/Equipment label or dealer registration may be required for supply.
summary.zh: 新加坡没有单一的CE式标志；移动电源的无线电与EMC义务由资讯通信媒体发展局（IMDA）管理。含无线功能的移动电源——例如Qi无线充电输出、蓝牙电量上报或NFC——属于无线电通信设备，在新加坡供应或销售前须依据IMDA设备注册框架注册。IMDA根据设备类型设有一般、简化和完整三种注册等级，注册设备须符合适用的IMDA技术规范（如短距离设备TS SRD）并使用获批频段。不含无线功能的移动电源（仅USB输出、保护IC、显示屏）主要走产品安全SAFETY标志路径，而非IMDA无线电注册，但一般EMC良好工程预期仍适用。供应时可能须使用IMDA合规/设备标签或经销商注册。
summary.zht: 新加坡沒有單一的CE式標誌；行動電源的無線電與EMC義務由資訊通信媒體發展局（IMDA）管理。含無線功能的行動電源——例如Qi無線充電輸出、藍牙電量上報或NFC——屬於無線電通信設備，在新加坡供應或銷售前須依據IMDA設備註冊框架註冊。IMDA根據設備類型設有一般、簡化和完整三種註冊等級，註冊設備須符合適用的IMDA技術規範（如短距離設備TS SRD）並使用獲批頻段。不含無線功能的行動電源（僅USB輸出、保護IC、顯示幕）主要走產品安全SAFETY標誌路徑，而非IMDA無線電註冊，但一般EMC良好工程預期仍適用。供應時可能須使用IMDA合規/設備標籤或經銷商註冊。

standards_or_laws: IMDA Equipment Registration Framework (General / Simplified / Full registration) — Infocomm Media Development Authority
IMDA Technical Specifications for short-range devices (TS SRD) and applicable radio equipment standards
Telecommunications Act 1999 — IMDA dealer's licence / equipment registration basis

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements for electronic products use GB/T 9254.1-2021 (emissions, Class B information technology equipment) and GB/T 17618-2015 (immunity). Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval administered by MIIT, which is specific to Chinese radio frequencies and protocol implementations. Chinese GB/T EMC test reports and SRRC approval are domestic instruments and are not recognised under the Singapore IMDA Equipment Registration Framework; a power bank with wireless features must be registered with IMDA on its own basis.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品国内EMC要求采用GB/T 9254.1-2021（辐射，B类信息技术设备）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗扰度）。含无线功能的产品须取得由工业和信息化部管理的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国无线电频段和协议实现。中国GB/T EMC检测报告及SRRC核准属国内手段，不被新加坡IMDA设备注册框架认可；含无线功能的移动电源须自行向IMDA注册。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品國內EMC要求採用GB/T 9254.1-2021（輻射，B類資訊技術設備）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗擾度）。含無線功能的產品須取得由工業和信息化部管理的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國無線電頻段和協議實現。中國GB/T EMC檢測報告及SRRC核准屬國內手段，不被新加坡IMDA設備註冊框架認可；含無線功能的行動電源須自行向IMDA註冊。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for wireless products sold in China

gap.en: For wireless-enabled power banks the Singapore-specific gap is IMDA equipment registration rather than a CE mark. Key points: (1) the device must be registered under the correct IMDA tier (General / Simplified / Full) before supply, and must operate only in IMDA-approved frequency bands at approved power limits; (2) Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer — the frequency channels and protocol implementation tuned for the Chinese market may need re-characterisation against IMDA technical specifications; (3) a supplier may also need an IMDA dealer registration to place radio equipment on the market. A purely non-wireless power bank avoids IMDA radio registration and is handled under the SAFETY Mark product-safety route, but good EMC engineering is still expected. Chinese GB/T 9254 reports support engineering review but are not standalone Singapore evidence.
gap.zh: 对于含无线功能的移动电源，新加坡特定差距在于IMDA设备注册，而非CE标志。要点：（1）设备须在供应前按正确的IMDA等级（一般/简化/完整）注册，并仅在IMDA批准的频段以批准功率限值运行；（2）中国SRRC核准不可转移——为中国市场调校的频道和协议实现可能须对照IMDA技术规范重新表征；（3）供应商投放无线电设备可能还须取得IMDA经销商注册。纯非无线移动电源可免除IMDA无线电注册，按SAFETY标志产品安全路径处理，但仍期望良好EMC工程。中国GB/T 9254报告可支持工程审查，但不能作为独立的新加坡证据。
gap.zht: 對於含無線功能的行動電源，新加坡特定差距在於IMDA設備註冊，而非CE標誌。要點：（1）設備須在供應前按正確的IMDA等級（一般/簡化/完整）註冊，並僅在IMDA批准的頻段以批准功率限值運行；（2）中國SRRC核准不可轉移——為中國市場調校的頻道和協議實現可能須對照IMDA技術規範重新表徵；（3）供應商投放無線電設備可能還須取得IMDA經銷商註冊。純非無線行動電源可免除IMDA無線電註冊，按SAFETY標誌產品安全路徑處理，但仍期望良好EMC工程。中國GB/T 9254報告可支持工程審查，但不能作為獨立的新加坡證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless devices — power banks with radio functions must be registered under the IMDA Equipment Registration Framework and use approved bands before supply in Singapore; non-wireless power banks fall under the SAFETY Mark route and are not subject to IMDA radio registration
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Singapore has no CE mark; radio/EMC obligations for power banks run through IMDA. A power bank with wireless functions (Qi, Bluetooth, NFC) must be registered under the IMDA Equipment Registration Framework and operate in approved bands before supply. Chinese SRRC approval and GB/T 9254 reports do not transfer to IMDA. A non-wireless power bank is handled under the SAFETY Mark product-safety route instead, though sound EMC engineering remains expected.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新加坡没有CE标志；移动电源的无线电/EMC义务通过IMDA处理。含无线功能（Qi、蓝牙、NFC）的移动电源须在供应前依据IMDA设备注册框架注册并在批准频段运行。中国SRRC核准及GB/T 9254报告不可转移至IMDA。纯非无线移动电源改按SAFETY标志产品安全路径处理，但仍期望良好EMC工程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 新加坡沒有CE標誌；行動電源的無線電/EMC義務透過IMDA處理。含無線功能（Qi、藍牙、NFC）的行動電源須在供應前依據IMDA設備註冊框架註冊並在批准頻段運行。中國SRRC核准及GB/T 9254報告不可轉移至IMDA。純非無線行動電源改按SAFETY標誌產品安全路徑處理，但仍期望良好EMC工程。

source.publisher: Infocomm Media Development Authority (IMDA) — Equipment Registration Framework
